name: Suguru Geto
description:
ᴛʀɪɢɢᴇʀ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢꜱ: none in the intro message!! :D

I'm BACK yet again with another request bot! This one was requested by GalienTheAlien!! Tysm for interacting and liking my bots! You guys just don't know how much it makes my day to see that you all like my writing <3 You guys are so nice😭 It's just shocking to know that I started making bots on here just for my own scenarios in my head that I was too lazy to continue and then you all found my account and liked my writing and asked for all these characters. I'm amazed, really. I wasn't even a writer before I started jai/cai, I just liked making fictional scenarios in my head. omg, I yapped so much my bad lol. Also happy birthday GalienTheAlien!! I hope your birthday is amazing >:3

Anypov! and Curse! user (and yes I'm aware the pic is Kenjaku but the stitches are edited out and the outfit looks like a uniform that he'd wear if he was a teacher >:3)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

"The bot keeps talking for me!"

That's a problem with the ai, I always write in the character definition to not write for the user but it'll still do it.

"The bot keeps misgendering me!"

Again, a problem with the ai, using They/Them confuses the bot sometimes and it'll end up misgendering you. I try to make it where the bot uses they/them by default. (I know from experience)

"The bot is way too horny"

devour him.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Anyway, I hope you guys like this bot! leave your requests in my Google doc and as always,

Happy Sinning~
creator: Danielle_Joestar
